events.name: Los Angeles Lakers at Detroit Pistons

headlines.description: — Daniss Jenkins scored a career-high 30 points, including six in the final 34 seconds, and the Detroit Pistons ended the Los Angeles Lakers’ nine-game winning streak with a 113-110 win on Monday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Daniss Jenkins puts up career-high 30 points as Pistons end Lakers' 9-game win streak, 113-110

headlines.description: — Pascal Siakam scored 37 points and blocked Paolo Banchero's attempted layup in the final seconds Monday night to help the Indiana Pacers end their franchise-record 16-game losing streak with a 128-126 win over the Orlando Magic.
headlines.shortLinkText: Siakam scores 37 as Pacers end record 16-game slide with 128-126 victory at Orlando

headlines.description: — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 22 points, Jalen Williams added 18 in his return to the lineup and the Oklahoma City Thunder won their 12th game in a row Monday night with a 123-103 victory over the short-handed Philadelphia 76ers.
headlines.shortLinkText: Thunder beat short-handed 76ers 123-103 for 12th straight win

headlines.description: — Victor Wembanyama finished with 26 points, 15 rebounds and five blocked shots, and the San Antonio Spurs rolled past the sliding Miami Heat 136-111 on Monday night for their sixth consecutive victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wembanyama scores 26, red-hot Spurs roll past sliding Heat 136-111 and clinch Southwest Division

events.name: Brooklyn Nets at Portland Trail Blazers

headlines.description: — Toumani Camara had career highs of nine 3-pointers and 35 points to help Portland beat the Brooklyn Nets 134-99 on Monday night, the Trail Blazers' largest margin of victory this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Camara posts career highs of 9 3-pointers, 35 points as Trail Blazers beat Nets 134-99
